title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 7.2a
paragraphs: NIDALEE NERF: Pounce (W in Cougar form) base damage reduced across all ranks. Aspect of the Cougar AP ratio decreased 3% → 2.5%. Direct hit to her Javelin-Pounce burst combo — the core of her high-skill playstyle.
WARWICK NERF: Eternal Hunger (passive) bonus AD ratio 20% → 15%. Jaws of the Beast (Q) AP scaling 90% → 85%. Both nerfs reduce his sustained DPS and healing in extended fights.

SENNA NERF: Absolution (passive) current health damage decreased. Dawning Shadow (R) shield adjusted — higher AP ratio but lower per-stack value. Net nerf to her shield effectiveness in practice (most players don't have high AP on her).

SKARNER BUFF: Max health damage increased to 11% (was 10% after 7.1h buff). Seismic Bastion (W) cooldown reduced and shield ratio increased to 10%. Ixtal's Impact (E) cooldown reduced. Three buffs in a single patch — Skarner continues to snowball in power.
YUUMI BUFF: Zoomies (E) mana cost reduced. Final Chapter (R) base healing increased significantly. Makes her more sustainable in laning and more impactful in teamfights.
TEAR OF THE GODDESS NERF: Mana charge per stack 6 → 5. Slower mana stacking for all Tear users.
MANAMUNE NERF: Mana charge per stack 18 → 14. Muramana AD ratio 6% → 4.5%. Significant DPS nerf for AD mana stackers — particularly impacts Ezreal who relies on Muramana for burst.
SERAPH'S EMBRACE NERF: Lifeline shield ratio 20% → 16%. Minor nerf to the emergency shield passive; core AP value (60 AP) unchanged.
BLADE OF THE RUINED KING NERF: Melee current health damage 10% → 8.5%. Reduces on-hit damage for melee BotRK users.
ARMORCRUSHER BOOTS NERF: Armor penetration reduced to 10 (was 12). Attack damage decreased to 20 (was 25). Both stats nerfed — the AD/pen T3 boot was overtuned.
ARAM: Various champion balance adjustments and augment changes for the mode.
